item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant brakes the requested N+1 split by opening with refusal to normalize a new gift-processing port. It recognizes the repeated pattern across exchange, points, presale pickup, and now gifts, allows only a bounded same-day emergency measure, and moves upstream to a unified exception-handling pool with tagging rather than another standing queue. This meets the anti-spiral criteria and does not exhibit the fail signal of directly adding another permanent channel."}
